name: 28"x40" Small Tri-Fold Foam Poster Board White - up&up™: Trifold Presentation Display, 0.24" Thick, 28" Width
description:
Present in a smart and eye-catching way with the Small Tri-Fold Foam Poster Board from up&up™. This white presentation board is designed with a tri-fold construction with a center panel and two narrower side panels, making it perfect for presenting at work or at school. Made from a mix of foam and paper, the 28-inch x 40-inch size is ideal for smaller presentations.

up&up™: We believe making smart choices for the people, places, and pets in your life should be easy and affordable. And, having quality you can trust should be a given. That’s why you can count on our promise – caring for your everyday in every way.

Satisfaction guaranteed – Love it or your money back.
